tools.name: warehouse_list
tools.description: List all warehouses accessible to this token, returning code and display name. Returns: array of {code, name}.

tools.name: items_list
tools.description: List all items in a warehouse. Returns: array of {id, sku, name, category_id, category_name, current_stock, safety_stock, unit, unit_cost, gram_per_unit, updated_at}.

tools.name: items_detail
tools.description: Get full details for a single inventory item by ID. Returns: {id, sku, name, category_id, category_name, current_stock, safety_stock, unit, unit_cost, gram_per_unit, updated_at}.

tools.name: movements_list
tools.description: List recent stock movements (outbound requests and stocktake adjustments) for a warehouse. Returns: array of {id, type, item_id, item_name, qty, reason, created_at}.

tools.name: restock_create
tools.description: Create a restock (inbound) record. Returns: {id, item_id, quantity, warehouse_code}.

tools.name: restock_list
tools.description: List restock records for a warehouse. Returns: array of {id, item_id, item_name, qty, reason, created_at}.

tools.name: item_forecast
tools.description: Get consumption forecast for an item. Returns: {item_id, warehouse_code, horizon_days, daily_avg, forecast_total, confidence, computed_at, data_status}.

tools.name: procurement_store
tools.description: Get procurement recommendations for a store. Returns: {warehouse_code, computed_at, items: [{item_id, item_name, current_qty, in_transit_qty, daily_avg, forecast_total_horizon, safety_stock, suggested_qty}]}.

tools.name: procurement_hub
tools.description: Get procurement recommendations aggregated across all warehouses. Returns: {computed_at, items: [{item_id, item_name, total_suggested_qty, stores_needing, stores_detail}]}.

tools.name: outbound_create
tools.description: Create an outbound request: deduct stock and write movement record. Mirrors the Flask outbound_submit endpoint. Returns: {id, item_id, quantity, warehouse_code}.

quantity.description: Quantity to outbound (must be <= current stock)

tools.name: outbound_list
tools.description: List outbound requests for a warehouse. Returns: array of {id, item_id, item_name, quantity, reason, status, rolled_back, created_at}.

tools.name: outbound_rollback
tools.description: Roll back an outbound request: return stock to warehouse. Returns: {id, item_id, quantity}.

request_id.description: Outbound request ID to roll back

tools.name: warehouse_consumption
tools.description: Return per-item consumption summary for a warehouse with rank, qty, daily avg, turnover rate, and percentage. Returns: {items: [{rank, item_id, sku, name, category_name, unit, current_stock, safety_stock, consume_qty, active_days, daily_avg, turnover_rate, consume_pct, first_date, last_date}], warehouse_turnover: {window_days, warehouse_cogs_value, warehouse_avg_inventory_value, turnover_value, items_with_turnover, items_total, data_quality, method}}.

sort_by.description: Sort by: qty (default), value, turnover, name

tools.name: item_consumption
tools.description: Return consumption stats for a single item: 7d / 14d / 30d / monthly totals, weekly breakdown, and daily avg. Opt-in include_turnover adds a stocktake-anchored inventory turnover estimate. Returns: {item_id, sku, name, category_name, unit, current_stock, safety_stock, consume_7d, consume_14d, consume_30d, consume_monthly, weekly, [opt-in when include_turnover=true: inventory_turnover]}.

include_turnover.description: If true, also return inventory_turnover (stocktake-anchored average-inventory estimate). Default false.
